sets.rationale: High coefficient-of-variation numbers that have appeared in recent clusters. For entertainment only — past patterns do not predict future draws.
Numbers drawn below their expected frequency over the full history. There is no statistical 'due' effect — each draw is independent.
Numbers recurring most often across the recent 30-draw window. A pattern in past noise, not a forecast.
A balanced mix of frequently, rarely and averagely drawn numbers. Provided purely as a themed alternative to a random pick.
A left-leaning set (numbers 1-20) reflecting recent positional frequencies. Positional 'lean' carries no predictive weight.
